utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: You know you guys were a lot more supportive when I wanted to make denim furniture .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: No , Pheebs , listen , if you decide to do this , we will be supportive like crazy .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: We just want you to think it through .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah , honey , maybe you can talk to somebody who had a baby . Like your mom ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: My mom never gave birth . Oh ! But my birth mom did .

emotion_cause.span: 5_My mom never gave birth . Oh ! But my birth mom did .
